caption: A young man with glasses and a black t-shirt stands in front of a whiteboard, holding a blue lanyard with both hands. He appears to be giving a presentation or lecture, as he gestures with his right hand while speaking. The setting seems to be an indoor classroom or conference room, indicated by the presence of the whiteboard and a chair in the foreground. His body language suggests he is engaged and explaining something important, possibly related to the content on his shirt which features a graphic design. The overall atmosphere is one of focused communication and learning.
